classes.name: CandleLoadResult
classes.docstring: Outcome for a single symbol in the load job.

classes.name: IntradayCandleLoader
classes.docstring: Delta-fetches intraday 1 m bars for a stock list and validates candle counts.

methods.name: __init__
methods.signature:
def __init__(
        self,
        symbols: list[str],
        ibkr_host: str,
        ibkr_port: int,
        ibkr_client_id: int,
        db: DatabaseManager,
        hist_engine: HistoricalDataEngine,
        min_candles: int = _MIN_CANDLES,
        full_fetch_cal_days: int = _FULL_FETCH_CAL_DAYS,
        parent: QObject | None = None,
    ) -> None

methods.name: run
methods.docstring: QThread entry: run the async fetch loop in a fresh event loop.

methods.name: _run_yfinance_fallback
methods.docstring: Fetch 1m bars via yfinance when IBKR is unavailable (dev / offline mode).

methods.name: _fetch_symbol_async
methods.docstring: Delta-fetch 1 m bars for *symbol*. Pages when the window > 30 calendar days.

methods.name: _fetch_paged_async
methods.docstring: Fetch 1 m bars in ≤ 30-calendar-day pages (IBKR limit), newest-first.

methods.name: _request_1m_bars
methods.signature:
def _request_1m_bars(
        self,
        ib: Any,
        pacing: PacingQueue,
        symbol: str,
        end_dt: datetime,
        duration_days: int,
    ) -> list[OHLCVBar]
methods.docstring: Issue one IBKR 1 m-bar request through the pacing queue.

methods.name: _fetch_symbol_yfinance
methods.docstring: Delta-fetch 1 m bars from yfinance (max 7 calendar days lookback).

methods.name: _validate_candle_counts
methods.docstring: Aggregate timeframes (default: 3m, 15m) and verify each has ≥ min_candles bars.

methods.name: get_readiness_report
methods.docstring: Return a per-symbol readiness dict without triggering any fetches.

top_level_functions.name: check_candle_readiness
top_level_functions.signature:
def check_candle_readiness(
    symbols: list[str],
    db: DatabaseManager,
    hist_engine: HistoricalDataEngine,
    min_candles: int = _MIN_CANDLES,
    full_fetch_cal_days: int = _FULL_FETCH_CAL_DAYS,
) -> dict[str, SymbolReadiness]
top_level_functions.docstring: Pure DB-read readiness check — safe to call from any thread.

top_level_functions.name: _raw_bar_to_ohlcv
top_level_functions.docstring: Convert an ib_insync BarData object to :class:`OHLCVBar`.
